creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for your patch.

Before committing I have a question.

Have you tested the port with "MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=yes/no"? Are you sure the
port breaks with MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=on?

I made some testing on quad core machines which gave no problems, so I'd
like to enable this option before committing with your approval, of
course.

Thank you.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
